kurdistanMentions.text: Last week, the House passed year-round E15 legislation, a big win for Kansas farmers and consumers. It lets the free market work by giving Americans another fuel choice at the pump while supporting domestic energy production and strengthening markets for our producers.

The House just passed year-round E15 in the House. This means more choices at the pump for Americans, stronger markets for Kansas agriculture, and more certainty for our energy producers.

This is a major win for American consumers and agricultural producers. https://t.co/83Yuh9Q2zg

Today, @HouseGOP will vote on year-round E15. 

Expanding E15 gives consumers more choice at the pump, strengthens domestic energy, and creates stronger markets for Kansas producers. As part of the Rural Domestic Energy Council, I’m proud to support this commonsense legislation.

Congress has heard time and time again from our agricultural producers that they need certainty and rural investment. Our 2026 Farm Bill:

✅ Improves access to credit for farmers and ranchers
✅ Invests in rural energy production
✅ Saves farmers money by removing overreaching

Kansas farmers help fuel the world, and year-round E15 is a vital part of that future. Permanent access to E15 provides certainty for producers, supports domestic energy, and gives Americans more affordable options at the pump.

This is commonsense policy that is good for Kansas

The House just passed the Farm, Food, and National Security Act with bipartisan support.

Our 2026 Farm Bill expands trade promotion programs, invests in rural development and energy programs, reduces unnecessary bureaucracy, and prioritizes American commodities in food https://t.co/bEFYswgVf0
